title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Rhenus Logistics India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Rhenus Logistics India
jsonLd.description:
Rhenus Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Rhenus Logistics India:
Rhenus Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rhenus Logistics India!
